data.page_content:
Welcome to the Divoom API

    
##### command description

- it will set the device brightness. 

##### Request URL
- ` http://IP:9000/divoom_api `
  
##### Request method
- GET 

##### para

|Name|DATA TYPE|DESCRIPTION|
|:----    |:----- |-----   |
|Command |string |Channel/SetBrightness |
|Brightness |Number |0~100  |

##### request example 

``` 
{
    "Command":"Channel/SetBrightness",
    "Brightness":100
}

```
##### respone example 

``` 
  {
    "ReturnCode": 0
  }
```

##### Return value 

|Name|DATA TYPE|DESCRIPTION|
|:-----  |:-----|-----                           |
|ReturnCode |number   |0  |
